sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11804" key="a)pe/lastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπέλαστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n11804.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unapproachable,</tr_> dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
